title: stelis gongylophora
intro: Stelis gongylophora, also known as the False Pothos, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and treat cardiovascular issues due to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Stelis gongylophora are often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
